tasks.title: Create QB Cost of Labor sub-accounts
tasks.note: In QuickBooks: COGS > Cost of Labor. Manually add two sub-accounts: 'Cost of Labor - Dunkley' and 'Cost of Labor - Frost'. This is required before any shoot costs can be categorized by person — which blocks the Lili invoice and CFO accuracy.

tasks.title: Lili invoice
tasks.note: Invoice for Lili Geller job. Can't be finalized until the QB sub-accounts (t1) exist so COGS can be properly split. Also still need from you: the line items for the shoot and what Aidn was paid.

tasks.title: Restart Cosmo on Local
tasks.note: Cosmo (the AI chief of staff bot) runs on Local (192.168.1.73). A cache fix and CFO rule updates are staged but won't take effect until it's restarted. Command: pkill -f cosmo.py && nohup python3 ~/Cosmo/cosmo.py >> ~/Cosmo/cosmo.log 2>&1 &

tasks.title: Wire Cosmo → CFO dispatch hook
tasks.note: Adds a hook so Cosmo can trigger the CFO agent on command (e.g. 'run CFO report'). Blocked until Cosmo is restarted and confirmed working. Small wiring job once t3 is done.

tasks.title: QBO OAuth: decide Path A or B
tasks.note: Path A: Submit the Intuit developer review form for production API access — takes days to approve but gives live QB data in Claude. Path B: CSV export workflow — works today but requires manual steps. This decision is holding up CFO automation. Pick one.

tasks.title: Aerial Tour split — confirm with Ty
tasks.note: The revenue split for Aerial Tour jobs with Ty hasn't been locked in. Currently assumed 50/50 but not confirmed. Affects how the CFO waterfall calculates payouts — needs to be settled before it can run correctly.

tasks.title: Signature video — name, price, split
tasks.note: The 'signature video' is a planned premium product that doesn't have a name, price, or partner split defined yet. CMO can't market it and CFO can't track it until those three things are locked.

tasks.title: Welcome deck PDF export
tasks.note: Export the v15 Welcome deck PPTX from PowerPoint as a PDF, then run the spread script: python3 ~/Desktop/Claude\ Outputs/Design/set_pdf_spread.py <your-exported-file.pdf>
